text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One evening, I see <chrname> back to<n>her dorm
after the day's training runs<n>a little longer than
expected. Just after<n>we say our goodbyes...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>! Nice to see you!<n>Are you
heading home now?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I see! I just saw Meek off and was<n>thinking
about heading back to the<n>trainer dorms myself,
so...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
If it's all right with you, why don't we<n>go back
together?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Unless you think that's a little<n>too—how should I
put this—chummy?<n>We are coworkers, after all...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We talk about various things on the<n>way back to
the dorms.
